semantic.role: Infrastructure rule loader that reads and parses rule documents from the filesystem into typed SpineRuleDocument objects.
responsibilities: Load all YAML/Markdown rule files from a specified directory on disk.
Parse YAML frontmatter and Markdown body using gray-matter to extract metadata such as title, severity, and summary.
Construct and return an array of LoadedRuleFile entries, each containing the file path and a fully populated SpineRuleDocument with defaults for missing fields.
Return an empty array if the specified rules directory does not exist.
outOfScope: Rule validation or enforcement – this module only loads raw rule documents without verifying their correctness.
Runtime parsing of rule content beyond the initial load phase.
Rule migration or schema version upgrades beyond recording the current schema version.
invariants: This module is part of the infra layer and must expose a stable, low-level public surface (only loadRulesFromDir).
Callers should import from this module's public export rather than reaching into internal helpers like slugifyRuleId or the LoadedRuleFile interface.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a thin, filesystem-bound adapter that translates on-disk YAML/Markdown rule files into the core SpineRuleDocument type, decoupling rule storage format from rule consumption.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent change intent could be inferred from the provided git intent (commit message '4ded6c5 1' is too vague). The module appears stable.

publicSurface.description: Reads all YAML/Markdown rule files from a given directory, parses them into SpineRuleDocument objects, and returns an array of LoadedRuleFile entries. Used by the rule engine to load project-specific rules.
